description: ISNA is an Iranian news agency established in 1999 under the auspices of the Ministry of Science, Research and Technology, linked to regime-aligned student organizations. Among Iranian state-adjacent media, ISNA has at times published relatively more open reporting, occupying a centrist position in the regime media spectrum. It covers education, science, and general news.
editorial_notes: Linked to the Ministry of Science and Islamic student associations. Relatively moderate within regime bounds.
